title: Crab (Mob Vote 2023)
description: This texture pack changes axolotl the crab from the Minecraft Mob Vote 2023 !
body:
![CRABS](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/sttmidnF/images/1084a65e087ddc4ffac139bf34cf42c55a057589.png)


Vote for the Crab !

This texture pack changes axolotls to the crab from the Minecraft Mob Vote 2023.

Optifine/EMF mod required.
